xwikidoc.name: ContributorsListSheet
xwikidoc.creator: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.title: Contributors List Sheet
xwikidoc.content:
{{velocity}} #set ($topSpace = $doc.documentReference.extractFirstReference('SPACE').getName()) #set ($entryObject = $doc.getObject("${topSpace}.Code.EntryClass")) #set ($contributorsObject = $doc.getObject("${topSpace}.Code.ContributorsListClass")) #if ($xcontext.action == 'inline' || $xcontext.action == 'edit') #if ("$!request.product" != '') #set ($discard = $entryObject.set('product', $!request.product)) #end #if ("$!request.version" != '') #set ($discard = $entryObject.set('version', $!request.version)) #end #if ("$!request.type" != '') #set ($discard = $entryObject.set('type', $!request.type)) #end (% class='xform col-xs-12' %)((( ; Contributors (one per line) : $doc.display('contributors', 'edit', $contributorsObject) ))) #else #set ($contributors = "$!contributorsObject.getValue('contributors')") #if ($contributors != '') The following people have contributed code to this release (sorted alphabetically):
## Sort the contributor names alphabetically, ignoring case, before rendering them. #set ($sortedContributors = []) #foreach ($contributor in $contributors.split('[\r\n]+')) #set ($name = $contributor.trim()) #if ($name != '') #set ($index = $sortedContributors.size()) #foreach ($existing in $sortedContributors) #if ($name.compareToIgnoreCase($existing) < 0) #set ($index = $foreach.index) #break #end #end #set ($discard = $sortedContributors.add($index, $name)) #end #end #foreach ($contributor in $sortedContributors) * $services.rendering.escape($contributor, 'xwiki/2.1') #end #else {{warning}}The list of contributors has not been generated yet.{{/warning}} #end #end {{/velocity}}
